motivation: User wanted to install/compile/run the project to verify it can be built and started successfully in their environment.
approach: Built the project using the existing Bun build pipeline (`bun run build`), then validated the artifact by running the generated CLI (`node dist/cli.js --version`) and launching the interactive UI to confirm it actually starts.
challenges: The only remaining blocker to full use is authentication: the app starts but reports `Not logged in · Run /login`.
tradeoffs: No code changes were made; the session focused on build/runtime verification rather than implementing login/config fixes.
outcome: Confirmed the project compiles and produces a working distributable (`dist/`) and that the CLI/UI can start; next required step for real usage is running `/login` inside the app.
